name: git-workflow
description: Standardized Git workflow with conventional commits, branch naming, and PR templates
content:
Enforce conventional commit format (type(scope): desc)
Run pre-commit hooks: lint, format, secret scan
Validate branch name against pattern: (feature|fix|chore|docs)/<issue>-<slug>
Generate changelog from commit history since last tag
Suggest squash-merge strategy for feature branches

name: docker-build
description: Multi-stage Docker build with caching optimization and security scanning
content:
Parse Dockerfile and extract base images
Optimize layer ordering for maximum cache reuse
Run hadolint for Dockerfile best practices
Scan built image for known CVEs with trivy
Tag image with git SHA and push to registry

name: k8s-apply
description: Kubernetes manifest validation, diff, and apply with rollback support
content:
Validate all manifests with kubectl dry-run
Render Helm or Kustomize templates to final YAML
Show diff between current and desired state
Apply with server-side apply and field-manager annotation
Create rollback checkpoint before destructive changes

name: secret-management
description: Encrypted secret storage and injection for local development and CI/CD
content:
Decrypt .env.encrypted using age or sops
Inject secrets into shell environment
Validate required secrets are present before deploy
Rotate expired secrets with new encryption
Warn if secrets are committed to version control

name: slack-notify
description: Send formatted Slack messages with rich attachments for CI/CD events
content:
Format message as Slack Block Kit JSON
Send to configured webhook URL with retry logic
Include deploy status, commit SHA, and author
Tag relevant channel members on failure
Provide link to CI build logs and rollback instructions

name: code-review-checklist
description: Automated code review checklist covering security, performance, and style
content:
Check for hardcoded secrets or credentials
Verify error handling covers all edge cases
Review type safety and null-handling patterns
Flag overly complex functions (cyclomatic > 10)
Ensure test coverage for new or changed logic

name: react-component-dev
description: React component development scaffold with Storybook stories and accessibility checks
content:
Scaffold new component with TS interface and CSS module
Generate Storybook story with controls and knobs
Run axe-core accessibility audit on rendered component
Verify component renders correctly across breakpoints
Export component with named export and barrel index

name: vue-page-builder
description: Vue 3 page scaffolding with composition API, Pinia store, and route config
content:
Generate Vue SFC with script setup and scoped styles
Create Pinia store module with actions and getters
Register route with lazy-loading and meta guards
Add form validation rules using VeeValidate
Write Vitest unit tests for composable functions

name: e2e-test-runner
description: Playwright end-to-end test suite runner with parallel execution and video recording
content:
Bootstrap Playwright test fixtures with auth state
Run tests across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit
Capture video and trace on test failure
Retry flaky tests up to 3 times with backoff
Publish test report to S3 and notify on regression

name: go-api-dev
description: Go HTTP API development with OpenAPI spec generation and middleware wiring
content:
Generate Go handler stubs from OpenAPI 3.0 spec
Wire middleware chain: logging, auth, rate-limit, tracing
Run go vet and staticcheck on changed packages
Build multi-arch Docker image for the service
Generate mocks for interfaces and run integration tests

name: sql-migration
description: Database migration management with up/down migrations and data backfill
content:
Create timestamped migration files for up and down
Validate SQL syntax against target dialect (PostgreSQL)
Run migration dry-run in a transaction that rolls back
Lock migration table to prevent concurrent runs
Backfill data transformation in batches with progress log

name: terraform-deploy
description: Terraform infrastructure provisioning with state management and drift detection
content:
Init Terraform with remote state backend (S3 + DynamoDB)
Generate plan and require human approval for production
Apply infrastructure changes in dependency order
Detect and report configuration drift against live state
Tag all resources with cost center and environment labels

name: api-gateway-config
description: API Gateway route configuration with rate limiting, auth, and canary releases
content:
Define upstream services with health check endpoints
Configure rate limiting per route and consumer
Set up JWT or OIDC authentication plugins
Route percentage of traffic to canary version
Sync gateway configuration from declarative YAML source

name: python-data-pipeline
description: Python ETL pipeline with Airflow DAG generation and data quality checks
content:
Generate Airflow DAG with task dependencies and retries
Run data quality assertions after each transformation step
Partition large datasets by date for incremental processing
Write Parquet output with schema evolution support
Emit custom metrics to CloudWatch for pipeline monitoring

name: ml-model-deploy
description: ML model packaging and deployment with A/B testing and monitoring
content:
Serialize model artifacts with MLflow tracking URI
Build inference container with ONNX runtime
Deploy to Kubernetes with HorizontalPodAutoscaler
Route 5% of production traffic to new model version
Monitor prediction drift and log distribution statistics

name: grafana-dashboard
description: Grafana dashboard provisioning with Prometheus datasource and alert rules
content:
Define dashboard panels with PromQL queries
Provision alert rules with severity labels and thresholds
Create dashboard JSON model with templating variables
Export dashboard as version-controlled JSON file
Validate panel rendering against a test data source

name: load-test-runner
description: Distributed load testing with k6 and real-time metrics visualization
content:
Write k6 test script with thresholds and scenarios
Run load test locally with virtual users ramp-up pattern
Stream metrics to Prometheus during test execution
Compare p50/p95/p99 latency against baseline
Notify Slack with test summary and pass/fail verdict

name: incident-response
description: Incident response runbook with severity classification and escalation paths
content:
Classify incident severity based on SLO burn rate
Create dedicated Slack channel with incident template
Gather logs, metrics, and traces into a timeline
Execute runbook steps with checklist tracking
Post-incident review template with action item tracking

name: airflow-dag-deploy
description: Airflow DAG deployment with git-based sync, variable management, and pool config
content:
Sync DAG files from git repository to Airflow DAGs folder
Set Airflow variables and connections from vault secrets
Configure worker pools with slot counts per priority
Trigger DAG backfill for specified date range
Notify Slack on DAG failure with task log snippets
